---
title: "Marrow"
subtitle: "Apache Arrow in Mojo"
---

Marrow is an implementation of [Apache Arrow](https://arrow.apache.org) written in [Mojo](https://www.modular.com/mojo). It provides a columnar in-memory array format with null handling, SIMD-accelerated compute kernels, GPU support, and a Python binding layer that outperforms PyArrow on numeric array construction.

## Build

```bash
git clone https://github.com/kszucs/marrow
cd marrow
pixi run build_python    # compiles python/marrow.so
```

Then in Python:

```python
import marrow as ma
```

## 5-minute example

```{python}
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "../python")
import marrow as ma
```

### Create arrays

```{python}
# Primitive arrays — type is inferred from the Python data
a = ma.array([1, 2, 3, None, 5])
b = ma.array([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])

print(a)
print(b)
```

```{python}
# Strings and nested structures work too
names  = ma.array(["Alice", "Bob", None, "Dana"])
scores = ma.array([9.5, 8.2, 7.8, None])
print(names)
print(scores)
```

### Arithmetic

Null values propagate through element-wise operations — if either input is null, the output is null.

```{python}
result = ma.add(a, b)
print(result)   # index 3 is null because a[3] is null
```

```{python}
print(ma.mul(a, b))
```

### Aggregates

Aggregates skip null values.

```{python}
print("sum:    ", ma.sum_(a))    # 1+2+3+5 = 11, null skipped
print("min:    ", ma.min_(a))
print("max:    ", ma.max_(a))
print("product:", ma.product(a))
```

### Filter and drop nulls

```{python}
mask = ma.array([True, False, True, False, True])
print("filter:", ma.filter_(a, mask))
print("drop nulls:", ma.drop_nulls(a))
```

### Inspect arrays

```{python}
print("length:    ", a.__len__())
print("null count:", a.null_count())
print("type:      ", a.type())
print("is_valid(3):", a.is_valid(3))   # False — index 3 is null
```

---

## What's next

| Page | What you'll learn |
|------|------------------|
| [Arrays](guide/arrays.qmd) | All array types, nulls, slicing, nested structures |
| [Compute](guide/compute.qmd) | Arithmetic, aggregates, filter, drop_nulls |
| [Type System](guide/types.qmd) | Type inference, explicit schemas, struct types |
| [PyArrow Interop](guide/interop.qmd) | Benchmarks vs PyArrow, zero-copy C Data Interface |
